findings.description: The source h2 '拡張例' contains 3 h3 subsections (プロジェクト固有のバリデータを追加したい / プロジェクト固有のコンバータを追加したい / バリデーション対象のBeanオブジェクトの生成方法を変更したい), all merged into a single section s1. The combined content exceeds 2000 characters and the source has distinct h3 headings, so the knowledge file should split into at least 3 separate sections (s1, s2, s3).
findings.source_evidence: Source has three h3 headings delimited by '~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~'. Knowledge file has only one section s1 containing all three sub-topics.

findings.description: The Nablarch API class `ValidationContext` appears in method signatures of both SampleValidator and SampleConvertor in the source code, but is not listed in the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source code: `public <T> boolean validate(ValidationContext<T> context, ...` and `public <T> boolean isConvertible(ValidationContext<T> context, ...` and `public <T> Object convert(ValidationContext<T> context, ...`
